nasb.text: “So I will deliver you from the hand of the wicked, And I will redeem you from the grasp of the violent.”

esv.text: I will deliver you out of the hand of the wicked, and redeem you from the grasp of the ruthless.”

cnv.text: “我必搭救你脫離惡人的手， 救贖你脫離強暴人的掌握。”

ccb.text: 我要把你从恶人手中救出， 从残暴之徒的权势下赎回。”
